Appearances:
Plaintiff Dean Ross, is present.

Defendant, Urschel Nelson, is present.
Attorney, James O'Neil, representing the defendant through limited scope.
The Judge Pro Tem A.M. Young, litigants and counsel confer privately in Dept. 207, for settlement discussions.
This case did NOT settle.
The trial date of MAR-15-2010 remains on calendar.
